name: Lucky Minerals Inc.
summary: Lucky Minerals Inc. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and evaluation of mineral properties. The company explores for gold, copper, and molybdenum deposits. It holds a 100% interest in the Fortuna project covering an area of 550 square kilometer comprising of 12 contiguous mining concessions located in southern Ecuador. The company also holds an option to acquire 100% interests the Emigrant Creek project, which covers an area of 15 square kilometer situated in southern Montana, the United States; and the St. Julien project located in Montana, the United States. The company was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
